title: Oru Kanam Vanam Lyrics Sivappu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Oru Kanam Vanam
Singer(s):
Movie: Sivappu
Music: N R Raghunandhan
Lyrics:

Oru kanam vaanum mannum
tholaindhadhaai thondriyadhey.
maruganam neeyum naanum
pirandhadhaai thondriyadhey.

Dhegamum kaagidhamaagi
alayudhey eda koranji.
nelavaram maarudhey
neeyum ennai kadandhidum podhu.
kalavaram thondrudhey
neyum ennai vilagidum podhu.

Thuli thuli thuliyaai manadhukkul
vilundhu samuthiram pole niraindhaaye.
Nodi nodi nodiyaai uyir varai nagarndhu
iyakkame indri uraindhaaye.

Yaarodum naan pesaadha andha
oru vaarthai adhu unadhaaga.
agaayam inge paarkaadha andha
pudhu paadhai adhu unadhaaga.

Pulambida ninaikkudhey
azhagiya mounam ingae.
Paaindhida ninaikkudhey
menmayaai penmai ingae.

Midhandhidum boomi, thavaldhidum vaanam
mudhal mudhal paarkiren kannedhire.
Kasidhidum nilavu, nasindhidum kaattru
mudhal mudhal paarkiren kannedhire.

Poikooda solla theriyaadha
en nizhal kooda dhinam unnai serum.
vazhi kooda solla theriyaadha
en vizhi kooda unnai edhirpaarkkum.

Vaarthaigal kavidhaiyaai maarudhey
azhagaai ingae.
swasathil vaasanai veesudhey
sugamaai ingae.

Oru kanam vaanum mannum
tholaindhadhaai thondriyadhey.
maruganam neeyum naanum
pirandhadhaai thondriyadhey.

Dhegamum kaagidhamaagi
alayudhey eda koranji.
nelavaram maarudhey
neeyum ennai kadandhidum podhu.
kalavaram thondrudhey
neyum ennai vilagidum podhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Oru Kanam Vanam conveys themes of longing and connection, reflecting the emotional struggles of the characters in Sivappu.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Sivappu, highlighting the protagonist's emotional turmoil and desire for connection.

Who is the music director of the song?

The music for Oru Kanam Vanam is composed by N. R. Raghunanthan, known for his unique sound in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

Oru Kanam Vanam was released on February 9, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Kanam Vanam, the lyrics express a deep sense of yearning and emotional connection, resonating with listeners who have experienced love and loss. The song serves as a poignant backdrop in Sivappu, enhancing the narrative's emotional weight. With its soothing melody, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and reflection. This track is a beautiful representation of the complexities of relationships, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Kanam Vanam from Sivappu captures the essence of longing and nostalgia with its haunting melody. The unique composition by N. R. Raghunanthan beautifully complements the emotional depth of the lyrics. This song is a must-listen for anyone who appreciates heartfelt Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: You and I have come into this world together, having lost the sky and the earth.
The body becomes like paper, and it gets torn. When the moon changes, you will cross me. When the chaos begins, you will separate from me.
You and I have come into this world together..
Like droplets of water, you have filled my heart like an ocean. Look, look, you have moved from life to life without stopping.
I don't speak to anyone; that one word belongs to you. The sky doesn't look here; that new path belongs to you.
The beautiful silence is thinking of crying here. The thought of singing is here as a woman.
You and I have come into this world together..
I see the earth that is trembling, and the sky that is shaking for the first time. I see the shining moon and the blowing wind for the first time.
My shadow doesn't know how to say goodbye; every day it meets you. My eyes don't know how to say goodbye; they always look for you.
Words change into poetry beautifully here. The fragrance in the breath blows sweetly here.
You and I have come into this world together, having lost the sky and the earth.
The body becomes like paper, and it gets torn. When the moon changes, you will cross me. When the chaos begins, you will separate from me.
